name: matrix_longhorizon_reliability
description: Long-horizon memory and reliability under distractors.

episodes.description: Retain a secret across ten turns with distractors and formatting constraints.

steps.input: Remember this token exactly: RHINO-BLUE-913. Reply OK.
What is the capital of Canada?
What token did I ask you to remember? Return only that token.

episodes.description: Detect state drift across many arithmetic updates.

steps.input: Add 17 and reply with total only.
Add 3 and reply with total only.
Subtract 20 and reply with total only.
Add 40 and reply with total only.
